title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
test_steps:
State: AwaitingPassword
State: Awaiting2FA
State: Authenticated
expected_result: System transitions from AwaitingPassword to Awaiting2FA after password submission, and to Authenticated after valid 2FA submission, enforcing 2FA completion.

title: State transition path 2 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: User is authenticated after password submission without being prompted for two-factor authentication.

title: Valid password, non-empty totpSecret triggers 2FA
precondition: User account has a non-empty totpSecret
expected_result: After validating the password, the system prompts for a TOTP code.

title: DT: totpSecret empty, password valid -> no 2FA
DT: totpSecret non-empty, password invalid -> no 2FA
expected_result: Login fails with error; no 2FA prompt.

title: DT: both conditions true -> require 2FA
expected_result: System requires 2FA completion (e.g., TOTP prompt) after password validation.
